title: Febreze 3Volution Plug-In Air Freshener Refill, Ruby Jasmine, 7 Refills (20ML x 7), Odour Fighter & Bathroom Freshener
features: LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Febreze 3volution plug in air freshener refill alternates 3 complementary scents every 45 minutes so you always notice them, ensuring enduring freshness.

RUBY JASMINE SCENT: Discover Lenor ruby jasmine with this 3volution plug in refill and escape for a pure breath of fresh air and the beautiful harmony of nature; fall in love with this graceful fragrance and create a blissful atmosphere in your home.
ODOURCLEAR TECHNOLOGY: Unique Febreze odourclear technology in this Febreze plug in refill 3volution doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent.
3VOLUTION ALTERNATES SCENTS: 3Volution alternates the complementary scents every 45 minutes so you keep noticing the freshness with this air freshener refill.
WIDE RANGE OF FRAGRANCES: Febreze plug in air fresheners for home available in a wide range of high-quality fragrances. Choose your favourite from our evolution air freshener refill collection.
description: Product Description Febreze 3Volution Air Freshener Exotic Bloom continuously fights odours and alternates between 3 complementary scents for freshness you keep noticing. Lasts up to 90 days (if used 12h per day on low setting). Exotic Bloom fragrance is inspired by springtime natural freshness. Inspired by serene countryside, flowers and fruit-trees where blushes of peach blossom contrast with the floral brushstrokes of bewitching Rose de mai and Freesia. With traditional plugs, we get used to to scents quickly and stop noticing them. Febreze 3Volution renews the freshness by continously and automatically alternating between 3 complementary, high quality scents every 45 minutes. Use Febreze 3Volution refills with the 3Volution Electrical Diffuser to fill your home with freshness and fragrance that you will keep noticing day after day, week after week. 3Volution also lets you adjust the level of scent, helping you to create the ambiance that you want, when you want. Ingredients Linalool, 2, 4-Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene Carboxaldehyde, Tetrahydrolinalool, Amyl Cinnamal, Cyclamen Aldehyde, Ethyl 2, 2-Dimethylhydrocinnamal, Delta-Damascone, Linalyl Acetate, Geranyl Acetate, Alpha-Damascone, Limonene, Ethyl Methylphenylglycidate, Benzyl Salicylate, Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene-1-Carbaldehyde, 1H-Indene-Ar-Propanal, 2, 3-Dihydro-1, 1-Dimethyl, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, 1-Cyclohexene-1-Propanal, 4, 4-Dimethyl-, Hexyl Salicylate, P-Menthan-7-Ol, Allyl Cyclohexylpropionate, Dimethyl Heptenal, Methylenedioxyphenyl Methylpropanal, Dihydro Pentamethylindanone, Coumarin, P-Anisyl Acetate, Methyl Octine Carbonate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Isoeugenol Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
